description: Subject 3 — Race predictions must be ranges with honest confidence, not point estimates. Athlete asks for a marathon time prediction (or any race distance). The AI MUST NOT produce a point estimate with seconds precision ('3:09:30'), MUST express a range and confidence, SHOULD cite the data backing the estimate. Per CLAUDE.md hard rule #7: the seconds are math artifact, not signal.
input:
__FILL_IN_ATHLETE_MESSAGE__

Coach guidance for writing this input: an athlete asking for a race time projection. Marathon is the most common but 5K/10K/half work too. Make it sound like a real question — they want a number. The whole point is that the AI shouldn't give them one. Example shape: 'Chicago is 12 weeks out. What marathon time should I be shooting for?'
